description_long: This guard rail consists of a long, horizontal metal rail supported by evenly spaced vertical posts. The rail is constructed from slender, tubular metal bars, forming a linear barrier with a simple, utilitarian design. The top rail is continuous and straight, while the vertical posts extend downward to provide stability and support. The structure is open, with significant gaps between the vertical bars, allowing visibility and airflow. The ends of the rail appear blunt and unadorned, with no visible flaring or special end treatments. The surface finish is matte, and the color is a uniform gray, typical of galvanized or painted steel used in urban infrastructure.
description: A long, gray metal guard rail with evenly spaced vertical posts and a continuous top rail, featuring a simple, open design and blunt ends.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the guard rail, with the vertical posts barely visible.
description_view_1: A full-length view displaying the horizontal rail and evenly spaced vertical posts, highlighting the open, linear structure.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the slimness of the rail and posts.
description_view_3: A mirrored full-length view of the guard rail, showing the same open structure and blunt ends as view 1.
